title: Show Google Files in Files Gallery
excerpt:
Currently, FIles Gallery can’t show Google Files added as links to a FIles column. 
As my company does not use Monday as files repository, the Files Gallery is useless as it is today.

posts.author: enanni (Edi Nanni)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, FIles Gallery can’t show Google Files added as links to a FIles column.
As my company does not use Monday as files repository, the Files Gallery is useless as it is today.

posts.author: emmamlpedego (Emma Martin LaPlant)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree that Google Files should show in the Files Gallery and would request that SharePoint and OneDrive files also show in the Files Gallery. Thanks for considering, Monday dev!
